author: Expunge
text:
state_remote: decouple balls/tasks ref from the code remote

Optional Config.state_remote names the git remote whose balls/tasks orphan ref is authoritative. Unset (and every pre-existing config) resolves to origin, so a single-repo setup is byte-identical; set it to a separate remote to point a client repo at a shared task hub while code stays on origin. Resolved at one seam (setup_state_branch param, the git-remote participant, bl sync's state-branch leg); no second path bakes in origin. config tests split to a sibling file for the 300-line cap. 100% coverage.
